messages.content: genera en 80 caracteres, sms de respuesta en ingles. para decirle a un hombre que quieres conocerlo. y a la ves respondas a : Hai
Sure, I'd love to get to know you too. When are you free to meet up? Hai
genera en 80 caracteres, sms de respuesta en ingles. para decirle a un hombre que quieres conocerlo. y a la ves respondas a : Hi
Hey! I actually wanted to ask if you'd like to grab a drink sometime and chat?

Hey there! I hope you're doing well. I've been thinking lately about wanting to meet new people and I was wondering if you'd be interested in meeting up sometime? Maybe grab a drink or something and chat? Let me know what you think!

Hey! I've noticed that we have a lot in common and I've been wanting to get to know you better. Would you like to grab coffee sometime and chat? I think it would be really fun to get to know each other! Let me know if that's something you'd be interested in.
Hi! I'm not sure if you're free this week, but I would love to meet up with you and hang out. Maybe we can grab lunch or go to a museum? Let me know if you're interested!
10 mas pero no sugieras salir ni reunirse
Hey there! It's really nice to talk to you. I was thinking maybe we could chat over the phone or have a video call sometime this week if you're free? Let me know if that works for you!

Hey! I've been seeing and hearing a lot of good things about that new restaurant downtown. Would you like to meet up with me and give it a try together sometime this week? Let me know if that's something you'd be interested in!
Hey! I don't know if you're into live music, but there's a concert coming up that I'm super excited about. Would you like to come with me and check it out this weekend? Let me know what you think!

Hey there! I hope you're doing well. I was wondering if you're free this weekend - I would love to grab a cup of coffee and get to know each other a little better.

Hey! I know we haven't really talked much yet, but I feel like we have a lot in common and I'd love to grab lunch together sometime soon.

Hey! I've really enjoyed our conversations so far and I was wondering if you'd like to head to the park and have a picnic with me this weekend? It's been so beautiful out lately!

Hey! I was thinking that it might be fun to get out and do something adventurous and new. Would you be interested in trying out that new rock climbing gym with me?

Hey! I was hoping that we could get together and play some board games or cards sometime soon. I think it would be really fun to hang out and get to know each other better!

Hey! I don't know if you're into art, but there's an exhibit at the museum that I've been wanting to check out. If you're interested, maybe we could go together sometime?

Hey there! I hope you're having a great day. I was thinking that it might be fun for us to go to a cooking class together and learn how to make something new. What do you think?

Hey! I was wondering if maybe we could take a walk together sometime soon. It's such gorgeous weather lately and I think it would be really nice to get some fresh air and chat.

Hey! I've been hearing a lot about this brewery that just opened up and I was wondering if you'd want to check it out with me sometime this week? I think it could be fun to try new beers and hang out!

Hey there! I was thinking that it might be fun to go to a comedy club sometime soon and see some live comedy together. Would you be interested in that?
